name: FTI CONSULTING, INC
business: FTI Consulting is a leading global expert firm for organizations facing crisis and transformation. It provides services through five reportable segments: Corporate Finance, Forensic and Litigation Consulting, Economic Consulting, Technology, and Strategic Communications. Clients include Fortune 500 corporations, FTSE 100 companies, major law firms, leading private equity firms, global banks, and governments.
sellsTo: local, state and national governments and agencies

exposures.sentence: We have been leveraging AI to develop solutions for our clients for over a decade, building a leading position in the legal market.

The evolving cybersecurity risk landscape, characterized by increasingly sophisticated threats and rising incidents of data breaches, drives demand for cybersecurity preparedness, post-breach investigations, crisis communications and related services, particularly in our FLC, Technology and Strategic Communications segments.
Blockchain & Digital Assets. We provide solutions that help companies innovate using blockchain technology and digital assets, while mitigating risks and meeting compliance obligations.

Data & Analytics. We provide in-depth analysis of large, disparate sets of financial, operational and transactional data, often when our clients are faced with a regulatory inquiry, investigation or a dispute.

catalysts.event: Accept possession of new London office lease
catalysts.sentence: We expect to accept possession of the premises on or about September 25, 2027, subject to the satisfaction of certain conditions.

catalysts.event: Commencement of fixed rental payments for London office lease
catalysts.sentence: Fixed rental payments under the Leases are scheduled to commence in February 2028, payable in quarterly installments, and will aggregate to approximately $115.0 million.
